chapters.title: Laundry Morning
chapters.content: On Saturday morning, Ethan starts his laundry routine. He separates white clothes, dark clothes, and towels before turning on the washing machine.

chapters.title: Waiting Time
chapters.content: While waiting, he cleans the apartment and listens to music. Laundry day feels less boring when the house is also getting organized.

chapters.title: Fresh Clothes
chapters.content: In the afternoon, Ethan folds everything neatly and places it in the closet. Clean clothes always make the weekend feel complete.
